title: CombatLog-Lite
description: CombatLog Lite – The simplest and most configurable CombatLog plugin made by pipewasxd, designed to prevent players from escaping combat while keeping setup easy and flexible.
body:
# CombatLog Lite

**A CombatLog plugin made by pipewasxd to stop players from escaping combat. Lightweight, simple, and fully configurable to keep PvP fair.**

## 🔹 Features

- **Combat Timer → Players stay in combat for a configurable duration (default: 60s).**

- **Combat Log Modes:**

> _instant_ → Player dies immediately on logout.
> 
> _delayed_ → Player has a grace period to reconnect.
>
> _warning_ → Broadcasts a warning when a player logs out in combat (no death).

- **Reconnect Control** → Limit the number of disconnects before instant death.

- **Grace Periods** → Customize how long players can reconnect in delayed mode.

- **Combat Logging File Tracking** → Keep logs of combat sessions in a custom file.

## 🔹 Timer Display Options

- **BossBar** – Display at the top of the screen.

- **ActionBar** – Display above the hotbar.

- **Chat** – Display start and end messages only.

## 🔹 Item Restrictions

- **Control item use during combat:**

> _Ender Pearls_ → Toggleable, with optional cooldown.
> 
> _Elytra_ → Disable flight while in combat.
> 
> _Riptide Tridents_ → Toggleable, with cooldown support.

## 🔹 Commands

>_/combatlog reload_ → Reload the plugin configuration.
> 
>_/tag <player>_ → Put a player into combat manually.
>
>_/untag <player>_ → Remove a player from combat manually.
>
>_/combatlog settings_ → Players can select their preferred timer display: ActionBar, BossBar, or Warning timers.

## 🔹 Command Restrictions

- **Players can be prevented from using certain commands while in combat to stop escape attempts.** 

- **Commands such as tp, home, spawn, warp, tpa, back, ec, and enderchest can be blocked, and this feature is fully configurable in the plugin config.**


**Enjoy this plugin? Join my Discord for updates, bug reports, and suggestions.**
